rationale: The candidate 9b9be4d1cbe6402b9629123f37d2a7fcdc1bb5fd is the best choice because it correctly handles the MDX structure (unlike 'current' and 'qwen' which wrapped the intro in a redundant code block) and provides a high-quality translation. It uses 'coalescence nulle' which is the standard technical term in French for 'null coalescing'. It also maintains the informal but professional tone of the original.
